introSection: Blizzard was a steel roller coaster located at Peter Pan's Playground in Brighton, East Sussex, England, UK. It had yellow track and was the larger Blizzard model. When the ride operated and what happened to it after it left Peter Pan's Playground is not known.
fullText: Blizzard was a steel roller coaster located at Peter Pan's Playground in Brighton, East Sussex, England, UK. It had yellow track and was the larger Blizzard model. When the ride operated and what happened to it after it left Peter Pan's Playground is not known.
